title: OpenAI Codex workflow examples
summary: Codex is being used for local automation workflows. Teams are testing document review and file organization. The important point is keeping private data under user control.

title: Agent automation moves into office workflows
summary: Agent tools are increasingly used for reports and inbox summaries. The workflow needs approval checkpoints. Local exports remain safer for early automation.

title: Security teams refine data access rules
summary: Security teams are tightening data access policies. Automation tools need clear token and storage rules. Preview steps reduce accidental data exposure.

title: Market teams watch AI infrastructure spending
summary: Analysts are tracking infrastructure spending linked to AI systems. The trend may affect cloud and chip demand. Teams should separate signal from hype.
